title: You Have Ten Years of Bid History. Most of It You Cannot Use.
author: Brad Berlin
description: The best estimating data a commercial GC owns is its own past bids, but it is trapped in scattered files. How historical bid data becomes a cost database you can use.

title: You Bought Togal and Building Connected. The Gap Between Them Is Still Manual.
author: Brad Berlin
description: You bought good takeoff and bid software. Estimating still feels slow because the friction lives in the hand-offs between the tools, where your estimator stands.

title: Hire Another Estimator, or Make the Four You Have Faster?
author: Brad Berlin
description: Most contractors facing a slow estimating team reach for a fifth estimator. Often it is a workflow-coordination problem, and a new hire just inherits the drag.

title: Where the Hours Actually Go in a Commercial Construction Bid
author: Brad Berlin
description: Estimators assume bid prep time lives in the takeoff. After sitting with estimating teams, here is where the hours in a commercial construction bid actually go.

title: I Built My Consulting Tech Stack with AI. Here Is What It Would Have Cost the Traditional Way.
author: Brad Berlin
description: A non-technical founder built a consulting tech stack with AI in two weeks, then estimated the traditional US development cost. The honest breakdown.
